- [[code/modules/crates/gcode/src/commands/codewiki|crates/gcode/src/commands/codewiki]] - This subsystem generates and maintains comprehensive hierarchical documentation for the repository by analyzing code dependencies, tracking ownership, leveraging AI-assisted content generation, and rendering structured, incrementally updated documentation sections with cryptographic integrity.

- [[code/modules/crates/gcore/assets|crates/gcore/assets]] - The crates/gcore/assets subsystem defines and manages the Docker Compose infrastructure configurations for the project's core backend data services, including PostgreSQL, Qdrant, and FalkorDB, along with their operational tooling and database extension setups.

[crates/gcore/assets/postgres-pgsearch/version.json:3]
[crates/gcore/assets/postgres-pgsearch/version.json:4-7]

[crates/gcore/assets/postgres-pgsearch/version.json:8]
- [[code/modules/crates/gcore/assets/postgres-pgsearch|crates/gcore/assets/postgres-pgsearch]] - This subsystem provides the Docker configuration, initialization scripts, and operational utilities required to deploy and manage PostgreSQL extensions for full-text search indexing and audit logging.
[crates/gcore/assets/postgres-pgsearch/version.json:2]
[crates/gcore/assets/postgres-pgsearch/version.json:3]
[crates/gcore/assets/postgres-pgsearch/version.json:4-7]
[crates/gcore/assets/postgres-pgsearch/version.json:5]
[crates/gcore/assets/postgres-pgsearch/version.json:6]
[crates/gcore/assets/postgres-pgsearch/version.json:8]
- [[code/modules/crates/gcore/assets/postgres-pgsearch/initdb.d|crates/gcore/assets/postgres-pgsearch/initdb.d]] - This subsystem initializes the PostgreSQL database by executing startup scripts to configure the pg_search and pgaudit extensions.
- [[code/modules/crates/gcore/assets/postgres-pgsearch/scripts|crates/gcore/assets/postgres-pgsearch/scripts]] - The subsystem provides shell scripts for exporting PostgreSQL audit data to support the pgsearch indexing infrastructure.
- [[code/modules/crates/gcore/src|crates/gcore/src]] - The gcore subsystem orchestrates the core application runtime by managing layered configuration resolution, backend service provisioning, capability-aware AI routing, hybrid search operations, and incremental file indexing.

- [[code/modules/crates/ghook/src|crates/ghook/src]] - This subsystem intercepts IDE hook events, constructs and serializes dispatch envelopes with terminal context, and reliably delivers them to a backend daemon via HTTP while managing graceful shutdown, message quarantine, and diagnostic reporting.

- [[code/modules/crates/gwiki/assets/skills|crates/gwiki/assets/skills]] - The subsystem manages static documentation and knowledge assets that define the system's core operational capabilities, including auditing, compiling, querying, and researching.
- [[code/modules/crates/gwiki/contract|crates/gwiki/contract]] - The subsystem defines the formal command-line interface contract for the gwiki tool, specifying its commands, arguments, flags, and structured output schemas.

- [[code/modules/docs/contracts|docs/contracts]] - Documents the interface contracts, command-line specifications, and shared graph schemas for the gcode and gwiki systems.
- [[code/modules/docs/guides|docs/guides]] - The docs/guides subsystem provides centralized reference documentation, user manuals, and developer instructions for all core system components and operational workflows.
- [[code/modules/docs/plans|docs/plans]] - The subsystem archives completed development plans, specifications, and release roadmaps to preserve design decisions and implementation references.
- [[code/modules/docs/plans/completed|docs/plans/completed]] - The completed plans subsystem archives finalized technical proposals and design specifications for historical reference and project tracking.
- [[code/modules/docs/spikes|docs/spikes]] - The subsystem documents architectural spike research and external callee dependencies across multiple programming languages.
- [[code/modules/scripts|scripts]] - The scripts subsystem executes automated verification checks to validate repository integrity and build processes.
